hero.title: Profhilo | Skin Hydration & Firmness Treatment
hero.description: Improve skin hydration, firmness and glow with Profhilo in Malaysia. Nexus Clinic KL offers doctor-led Profhilo treatment for dull, thin and ageing skin.
hero.details: Your skin can look tired even when you are not. It starts to feel thinner. Fine lines show more easily. Makeup stops sitting well. The glow fades. Skin loses bounce, and no cream seems to fix it for long. That is usually the point where skincare alone is no longer enough.
hero.note: Profhilo is not a filler. It does not change your facial shape. It works by spreading under the skin to improve hydration, elasticity and overall skin texture.

treatmentAtGlance.cta: Speak to a Doctor About Profhilo

whatIs.title: What Is Profhilo and
paragraphs: Profhilo is an injectable skin remodelling treatment made with high-purity hyaluronic acid. Unlike dermal filler, it is not used to build cheeks, shape the chin or add volume to the lips. Instead, it spreads through the tissue to improve hydration and support better skin quality.

It is often described as a bio-remodelling treatment because the goal is not to fill a line, but to improve the condition of the skin itself. Patients usually choose Profhilo when they feel their skin has become thin, tired, loose or less fresh than before.
One of the reasons Profhilo became so popular is that it treats skin quality in a very natural-looking way. Skin still looks like your skin, just healthier, more hydrated and more refined.
whatIs.quote: Profhilo improves skin quality. Filler changes volume and shape.
whatIs.cta: Find Out If Profhilo Is Right for You

helpsImprove.title: What Profhilo Helps Improve
helpsImprove.subtitle: At Nexus Clinic KL, Profhilo is commonly used for patients who want skin improvement without adding facial volume

items.title: Dull Skin
items.description: When skin loses hydration, it loses light reflection too. Profhilo helps improve moisture from within, which can make the skin look fresher and more radiant.

items.title: Fine Lines
items.description: Fine lines caused by dryness and thinning skin often become more visible with age. Profhilo is used to improve overall skin texture and softness, which can make these lines less obvious over time.

items.title: Loss of Skin Firmness
items.description: When the skin starts looking loose or less tight, especially on the cheeks, lower face or neck, Profhilo may help support firmer-looking skin through skin remodelling.

items.title: Crepey Skin
items.description: Profhilo is widely used for skin that feels thin, fragile or crepey, especially on the face, neck and hands.

items.title: Early Ageing
items.description: Some patients are not ready for filler or more advanced procedures. Profhilo is often chosen earlier, when the goal is prevention, hydration and skin quality maintenance.

helpsImprove.cta: Book a Consultation to See If Profhilo Matches Your Skin Goals

doctorLed.title: Nexus Clinic KL |
doctorLed.intro: Many clinics offer Profhilo in Kuala Lumpur. The product matters, but the assessment and injection technique matter just as much.
doctorLed.subheading: What separates Nexus Clinic KL from other clinics:
points: Personalised plan based on your skin quality and degree of ageing
Focus on natural improvement, not over-treatment
Suitable treatment combinations discussed honestly when needed
Full aftercare guidance and follow-up support
Authentic product used in a clinical setting
doctorLed.footnote: Profhilo should never be treated like a quick beauty add-on. It works best when the right patient is selected, the right protocol is used, and expectations are set properly from the start.

procedure.title: The Profhilo Procedure at Nexus Clinic KL
procedure.subtitle: Step by step — safe, precise, and personalized

steps.title: Full Skin Assessment
steps.desc: Your doctor examines skin texture, hydration, elasticity and laxity. This matters because not every patient who asks for Profhilo is actually the right fit for it.

steps.title: Personalised Treatment Planning
steps.desc: The doctor confirms whether Profhilo should be used alone or combined with something else. If your concern is volume loss rather than skin quality, you will be told clearly before treatment starts.

steps.title: Injection Session
steps.desc: Profhilo is usually injected using specific points designed for safe and even spread. On the face, the common protocol is 5 injection points per side.

steps.title: Second Session
steps.desc: Most patients need a second session around 4 weeks later for the standard treatment course.

steps.title: Review
steps.desc: Your skin is reviewed over the following weeks as hydration and firmness continue to build.

procedure.ctaSubtitle: 15-30 minute sessions at Nexus Clinic KL

benefits: Helps skin look smoother, fresher and more radiant
Softens the look of fine lines caused by dryness and thinning skin
Suitable for face, neck, hands and other areas depending on assessment
limitations: It is not a filler and does not replace lost facial volume

benefitsLimitations.footer: This is why proper assessment matters. If the real issue is volume loss, hollowing or heaviness, another treatment may be more effective.

sideEffectsAftercare.title: Profhilo Side Effects and Aftercare
sideEffectsAftercare.subtitle: Temporary, rare and usually mild
common: small raised bumps at injection points
rare: vascular complications, which are uncommon but serious with injectable treatments and require proper medical management
aftercare: Do not press or massage the treated area unless your doctor tells you to
Avoid alcohol for the first 24 hours if possible
Avoid sauna, steam and strong heat for 24 to 48 hours
Do not schedule facials or aggressive skin treatments immediately after
Give the treatment time to settle before judging the result
sideEffectsAftercare.aftercareNote: Most small injection-point bumps settle quickly. Skin improvement continues to develop over the following weeks.

faq.q: How much does Profhilo cost in Malaysia?
faq.a: Profhilo in Malaysia commonly falls around RM 2,000 to RM 3,500 per session, depending on clinic, area and doctor experience. A full 2-session course usually costs more overall.

faq.q: How many Profhilo sessions do I need?
faq.a: Most patients start with 2 sessions about 4 weeks apart. Some later continue with maintenance based on how their skin responds.
Results commonly last around 6 to 9 months, though this varies from person to person.

faq.q: Is Profhilo the same as filler?
faq.a: No. Profhilo is mainly used to improve skin quality, hydration and firmness. Filler is used to add volume and shape.
Most patients describe it as very manageable. You may feel brief stinging or pressure during the injections, but the procedure is quick.

faq.q: When will I see results from Profhilo?
faq.a: Some patients notice better hydration and glow first. Firmer, smoother improvement usually builds over the next few weeks.

faq.q: What age is best for Profhilo?
faq.a: There is no single best age. It is often chosen by adults who notice dullness, fine lines, dehydration or early skin laxity and want a natural improvement.
Profhilo can improve skin quality and mild laxity, but it does not replace a true lifting treatment when sagging is more advanced.
Downtime is usually minimal. Small bumps, redness or mild bruising can happen, but these are usually temporary.

faq.q: Who is not suitable for Profhilo?
faq.a: Suitability should be decided by a doctor. In general, injectable treatments may be postponed or avoided in people with active skin infection, certain medical issues, pregnancy, or other factors that need assessment first.
